hints.technical: You are improving "{{p1}}", but "{{p2}}" is getting worse. Inventors solved this as follows:
hints.physical: Physical contradiction: the parameter "{{p1}}" must meet opposing requirements. TRIZ suggests separation in time or space.
hints.empty: No ready-made recipes for this pair yet. Try more general parameters.

parameters.name: 1. Weight of moving object
parameters.desc: Mass of the body or system in motion.

parameters.name: 2. Weight of stationary object
parameters.desc: Mass of an object that does not change its position.

parameters.name: 3. Length of moving object
parameters.desc: Any linear dimension of an object in motion.

parameters.name: 4. Length of stationary object
parameters.desc: Linear dimensions of a static object.

parameters.name: 5. Area of moving object
parameters.desc: Surface area of a body in motion.

parameters.name: 6. Area of stationary object
parameters.desc: Surface area of a static object.

parameters.name: 7. Volume of moving object
parameters.desc: Space occupied by an object during motion.

parameters.name: 8. Volume of stationary object
parameters.desc: Space occupied by a static object.

parameters.name: 9. Speed
parameters.desc: Rate of motion or process speed.

parameters.name: 10. Force
parameters.desc: Interaction that changes the state of an object (pressure, load).

parameters.name: 11. Stress or pressure
parameters.desc: Force per unit area or electrical tension.

parameters.name: 12. Shape
parameters.desc: External appearance or contours of an object.

parameters.name: 13. Stability of composition
parameters.desc: Integrity of the system and its resistance to destruction.

parameters.name: 14. Strength
parameters.desc: Ability to withstand loads without breaking.

parameters.name: 15. Duration of action (moving)
parameters.desc: Period during which a moving object can perform work.

parameters.name: 16. Duration of action (stationary)
parameters.desc: Longevity and service life of a static device.

parameters.name: 17. Temperature
parameters.desc: Thermal state of an object or environment.

parameters.name: 18. Illumination
parameters.desc: Light level or radiation intensity.

parameters.name: 19. Use of energy (moving)
parameters.desc: Amount of energy or fuel required for operation.

parameters.name: 20. Use of energy (stationary)
parameters.desc: Energy consumption of static systems.

parameters.name: 21. Power
parameters.desc: Rate of performing work or energy transfer.

parameters.name: 22. Loss of energy
parameters.desc: Waste of resources that does not go into useful work.

parameters.name: 23. Loss of substance
parameters.desc: Leaks or waste of materials/raw materials.

parameters.name: 24. Loss of information
parameters.desc: Errors in data transmission or loss of knowledge.

parameters.name: 25. Loss of time
parameters.desc: Delays and non-productive intervals.

parameters.name: 26. Quantity of substance
parameters.desc: Material consumption or number of components.

parameters.name: 27. Reliability
parameters.desc: Ability to work without failure in various conditions.

parameters.name: 28. Measurement accuracy
parameters.desc: Closeness of a measurement to its true value.

parameters.name: 29. Manufacturing precision
parameters.desc: Compliance of the finished product with drawings.

parameters.name: 30. Harmful factors acting on object
parameters.desc: External influence (corrosion, noise) on the system.

parameters.name: 31. Harmful factors generated by object
parameters.desc: Damage created by the object itself (emissions, noise).

parameters.name: 32. Manufacturability
parameters.desc: Ease and cost-effectiveness of production.

parameters.name: 33. Ease of use
parameters.desc: Simplicity and comfort for the human operator.

parameters.name: 34. Repairability
parameters.desc: Speed and ease of returning to working order.

parameters.name: 35. Adaptability
parameters.desc: Ability to adjust to different operating modes.

parameters.name: 36. Complexity of device
parameters.desc: Number of parts and complexity of internal links.

parameters.name: 37. Complexity of control
parameters.desc: Difficulty in controlling the process.

parameters.name: 38. Level of automation
parameters.desc: Share of work performed without human intervention.

parameters.name: 39. Productivity
parameters.desc: Amount of output per unit of time.
